type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Variances due to updated methodology for emissions calculations in regards to overall stack height.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Regression to The Mean. Double digit increase in system Manganese last year has manifested as a double digit decrease in system Manganese this year. Manganese is a component in the biomass of our chips and swings in concentration are largely out of the Mill's control.
